Home / Listed Tokens / Manhattan

Manhattan

Listed Manhattan transportation tokens from the A/C Catalogue.

NY630Da New York & Harlem Railroad Omnibus

Early octagonal New York & Harlem Railroad omnibus token in German silver.

German Silver · 18 mm · $600.00

NY630AN New York City Transit Authority NYC

1953 small-format New York City Transit Authority fare token.

Brass · 16 mm · $1.00

NY630AR 1965 A.V.A. Convention Tour Token

Brass convention tour token issued for the 1965 American Vecturist Association convention in New York City.

Brass · 18 mm · $15.00

Exonumist is an independent collector resource focused on New York City token history.
